subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been perused and thy call hath been hearkened unto. Verily, He answereth him who calleth upon Him. He, verily, is the All-Answering, the All-Seeing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت ملاحظه شد و ندایت اصغا گشت انه اجاب من ناداه انه لهو المجیب البصیر
subcodes.subjects: @law of obligatory prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
